findings.evidence: Lines 95-108 define `lift` and `lift_mk`; `rg "AmbientIsotopyClass\.(ind|ext|rec|lift_unique)|theorem (ind|ext|rec|lift_unique)"` only finds the namespaces, not any public induction/extensionality/uniqueness declaration.
findings.fix: Add a wrapper induction principle and an extensionality or uniqueness theorem, e.g. prove functions/classes are equal when they agree on all `mk f` representatives, with representative computation simp lemmas.
findings.issue: `AmbientIsotopyClass.lift` exposes descent, but the API has no `induction_on`/`ext`/`lift_unique` lemma, so consumers proving equality or uniqueness of descended invariants must use raw `Quotient` internals rather than the class API.

summary: The quotient surface has constructors and computation lemmas, but it is missing the public induction/extensionality part of the quotient universal property.
